response.justification: Bogdan brings strong distributed systems experience, deep Python/TypeScript proficiency, and proven ownership in AI-agent infrastructure at Naver — directly aligning with the role’s core requirements. His open-source work and operational history demonstrate systems thinking and agile collaboration, though his lack of explicit AI/ML product experience and minimal mention of on-call/incident response are moderate gaps.
strengths: Proven staff-level experience in AI-agent infrastructure at Naver with MCP code generators
Deep expertise in distributed, high-throughput systems (e.g., millions of requests/sec at Dunnhumby)
Strong full-stack ownership with operational rigor (CI/CD, Kubernetes, on-call-like maintenance)
concerns: Limited explicit mention of AI/ML product exposure beyond infrastructure tooling
No clear documentation of incident response or out-of-hours on-call experience
German language skill is basic, potentially limiting stakeholder alignment in Berlin-based teams
